name: Prince Tea House
content: We stopped here for coffee late one night to meet up with some friends of friends. My friend had sent me the song “Outside” by breakk.away almost a year before that, which I had really liked. Around halfway through hanging out, I found out that my friend had forgotten to tell me that the people we were hanging out with were in fact the band breakk.away, who had written the song “Outside.” The best I can describe the cafe is pastel and pastries themed, and the food was pretty cool as well.
